creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 206079
Patch

plata-theme has been updated to 0.8.8.

Upstream changes:
- Unlocked min-height of Lollypop's sidebar GtkListBoxRows (Gtk 3.2x/4.0).
- Set proper background colors for Lollypop's sidebar (Gtk 3.2x/4.0).
- Stopped adding anti-overlap padding for SearchDisplay's child StBoxLayout (Gnome-Shell 3.32).
- Added new icon helper class styling (Gnome-Shell 3.32).
- Removed unneeded GtkPlacesSidebar's borders again (Gtk 4.0).
- Added WsSwitcher horizontal layout styling (Gnome-Shell 3.32).

https://gitlab.com/tista500/plata-theme/-/tags/0.8.8

QA:
poudriere testport OK (releng/12.0 amd64)
